title: Hershey Q1 Earnings Smashes Estimates; Sweetens FY22 Outlook
text: Hershey Co (NYSE: HSY) reported first-quarter FY22 sales growth of 16.1% year-on-year, to $2.67 billion, beating the consensus of $2.48 billion. Organic, constant currency net sales grew 11.5%.

title: Hershey Reports First-Quarter 2022 Financial Results; Raises 2022 Net Sales and Earnings Outlook
text: HERSHEY, Pa. , April 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Hershey Company (NYSE: HSY) today announced net sales and earnings for the first quarter ended April 3, 2022, and raised its full-year financial outlook.
